subject: [PATCH v2 1/7] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Gave a Reviewed-by tag without providing any specific feedback or comments.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the list_lru locking mechanism by removing unnecessary NULL checks in certain scenarios, ensuring that locks are always acquired successfully.
